header.desc: Quantify the real exposure of your facilities with an evaluation calibrated by G7 diplomatic standards.

methodology.title: Methodological Framework
methodology.id_desc: We catalog the critical assets of your organization: human talent, sensitive information, and physical infrastructure.
methodology.fmea_desc: Each security control is evaluated according to its impact weight (1-10), derived from Failure Modes and Effects Analysis used in critical engineering.
methodology.quant_desc: The Global Protection Index is a weighted percentage reflecting how many critical controls are implemented in your facilities.
methodology.note: Note: This tool provides an indicative evaluation based on international criteria. For an exhaustive diagnosis with physical inspection, CSSG deploys a team of executive-certified analysts who perform a full survey under ISO 31000:2018 standard.

context.title: Operational Context
context.desc: This information will be used to customize your final report.

perimetro.title: Perimeter Security
perimetro.subtitle: Protection of the first line of defense
perimetro.p1_detail: Perimeter walls, anti-climb fences, concertinas, or anti-ram bollards defining 100% of the perimeter.
perimetro.p2_detail: High-intensity luminaires (>300 lux in critical zones) with autonomous power source (UPS/generator) during outages.
perimetro.p3_detail: Infrared sensors, microwaves, perimeter fiber optics, or LiDAR detecting threats BEFORE the breach.
perimetro.p4_detail: Integrated AI cameras capable of identifying suspicious behavior patterns and generating automatic alerts.
perimetro.p5_detail: Random patrol routes with GPS/NFC verification, minimum frequency every 30 minutes, and reporting protocol.

accesos.title: Access Control
accesos.subtitle: Regulation of people and vehicle flow
accesos.a1_detail: Fingerprint, facial recognition, or iris systems combined with card/PIN for restricted areas.
accesos.a2_detail: Digital visitor log with photo, ID, reason for visit, host, and verifiable entry/exit time.
accesos.a3_detail: Double-door access points (mantrap) where only one can be open simultaneously, preventing piggybacking.
accesos.a4_detail: Vehicle barrier with cargo verification, inspection mirrors, and license plate reading (ANPR) at access points.
accesos.a5_detail: Classification of areas into Public, Restricted, and Critical with differentiated controls for each level.

procedimientos.title: Procedural Security
procedimientos.subtitle: Protocols, plans, and operational capacity
procedimientos.pr1_detail: Current document ensuring minimum viable operation against natural disasters, incidents, or targeted attacks.
procedimientos.pr2_detail: Tested plans with semi-annual drills, marked evacuation routes, and defined meeting points.
procedimientos.pr3_detail: Security audits with minimum quarterly frequency, using documented probability×impact matrices.
procedimientos.pr4_detail: Certified training for security personnel with minimum 40 hours annually in tactics, first aid, and protocols.
procedimientos.pr5_detail: Formal incident reporting system, evidence chain of custody, and auditable records for 5+ years.

inteligencia.title: Surveillance Intelligence
inteligencia.subtitle: Advanced monitoring and response capability
inteligencia.i1_detail: 24/7 monitoring room with certified operators, integrated displays, and redundant communication with law enforcement.
inteligencia.i2_detail: Reaction force deployment capacity in under 3 minutes from threat detection to intervention.
inteligencia.i3_detail: Security management platform unifying CCTV, intrusion, access, and fire into a single operational interface.
inteligencia.i4_detail: Ability to collect, analyze, and act on environmental threat info: crime, espionage, sabotage.
inteligencia.i5_detail: Digital radios with AES-256 encryption, satellite backup, and tested crisis communication protocol.

dashboard.cta_desc: Customize and download an executive PDF report with the results of your on-site diagnosis.
dashboard.cta_footer: Certified teams · National coverage · Executive report

modal.title: Download Private Report
modal.desc: Please enter your corporate data to generate and view your executive pdf report.
modal.name: Full Name
modal.error: There was an error generating the PDF. Please try again.

seo.title: Help Us Keep Innovating
seo.desc: Was this advanced AI-driven report useful to you? Our goal is to democratize corporate security. In exchange for this high-value tool, we invite you to leave a public review or acknowledgment.
seo.placeholder: Write your testimony of the evaluation...
